title: vangueria schliebenii
intro: Vangueria schliebenii, also known as the Schlieben's vangueria or African vangueria, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It is a deciduous shrub or small tree that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as treating various infections. Herbal preparations of Vangueria schliebenii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
